texto: No matter how big and tough a problem may be get rid of confusion by taking one little step towards solution. Do something. Then try again. At the worst so long as you don't do it the same way twice you will eventually use up all the wrong ways of doing it and thus the next try will be the right one.
explicacao: Citação de George F. Nordenholt sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “No matter how big and tough a problem may be get rid of confusion by taking one little step towar…” articula reflexao, problems, matter em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
